evidence_summary: The customer mentions being charged twice and noticing duplicate invoice amounts on their bank statement, and also provides their name.
handling_recommendations: Redact or remove any personal identifiers and payment details from the ticket before further processing.
Verify the customer's account and billing information before taking any action.
Escalate the issue to billing support as per business rules for premium customers.
Respond to the customer in a professional and empathetic tone, without confirming any refund or cancellation without verification.
